name: Neuroscience Research Topics Mind Map
input: Create a mind map of Alzheimer's Disease research areas. Central topic: Alzheimer's Disease. Main branches: Pathophysiology (Amyloid-beta plaques, Tau tangles, Neuroinflammation, Synaptic loss), Genetics (APP, PSEN1, PSEN2, APOE4, TREM2), Diagnostics (PET imaging, CSF biomarkers, Blood-based biomarkers, Cognitive testing, Digital biomarkers), Therapeutics (Anti-amyloid antibodies like Lecanemab and Donanemab, Tau-targeting therapies, Neuroinflammation modulators, Lifestyle interventions), and Clinical Trials (Phase I/II/III pipeline, Adaptive trial designs, Biomarker-guided enrollment, Combination therapies).
qualityCriteria: All 5 main branches present (Pathophysiology, Genetics, Diagnostics, Therapeutics, Clinical Trials)
Sub-branches include specific items (APOE4, Lecanemab, PET imaging, etc.)
Hierarchy depth is at least 3 levels (root -> branch -> leaf)
Drug names are not truncated (Lecanemab, Donanemab fully spelled)
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Radial mind map with color-coded branches per research area, clean typography, leaf nodes sized to fit their labels, no crossing lines.
